groups.title: Group A — derivable from existing weekly data
groups.description: Keys that can be computed from already-extracted weekly player stats without adding a new upstream source.

groups.title: Group B — source available but unwired
groups.description: Keys whose raw columns already exist in the nflverse weekly player stats artifact but are not yet normalized into canonical stats.

groups.title: Group A/B candidates blocked after verification
groups.description: Keys reviewed in the same quick-win tranche that could not be safely activated because the archived weekly source did not verify the needed field.

keys.label: Return first downs
keys.recommendedPath: Keep blocked until a verified source field exists.
blockers: Archived nflverse weekly player stats do not expose a verified return-first-down column; return_fd cannot be activated from the current weekly source.

groups.title: Group C — additional PBP derivations
groups.description: Keys that still require more play-by-play-derived canonical stats beyond the H2/H2.1 set now in production.

keys.label: Offensive fumble recovery
keys.recommendedPath: Extend the PBP derivation pipeline with a new derived canonical stat.

keys.label: Passing TD of 40+ yards bonus
keys.recommendedPath: Extend the PBP derivation pipeline with a new derived canonical stat.

keys.label: Passing TD of 50+ yards bonus
keys.recommendedPath: Extend the PBP derivation pipeline with a new derived canonical stat.

keys.label: Passing completion of 40+ yards bonus
keys.recommendedPath: Extend the PBP derivation pipeline with a new derived canonical stat.

keys.label: Reception of 40+ yards bonus
keys.recommendedPath: Extend the PBP derivation pipeline with a new derived canonical stat.

keys.label: Rush of 40+ yards bonus
keys.recommendedPath: Extend the PBP derivation pipeline with a new derived canonical stat.

keys.label: Offensive fumble recovery touchdown
keys.recommendedPath: Extend the PBP derivation pipeline with a new derived canonical stat.

groups.title: Group D — team-context dependent
groups.description: Keys that depend on team-level game results rather than player stat rows or player-level PBP accumulation.

keys.label: Points allowed: shutout (0)
keys.recommendedPath: Add a team game-result ingestion layer and team-defense aggregation.
blockers: Requires team-level game aggregate (points allowed per game), not per-player stats
